homepage.text: Sufism was once a reality without a name; it is now a name without a reality.
homepage.author: Anonymous shaykh of the 10th century

homepage.text: Make me enter, O Lord, into the depths of the Ocean of Your infinite Oneness.
homepage.author: Ibn ʿArabī
homepage.context: Prayer of the great Andalusian Sufi

homepage.text: Sufism is a taste — the direct knowledge of transcendent truths.
homepage.author: Classical Sufi definition

homepage.text: What you are seeking is also seeking you.
homepage.author: Rūmī

homepage.text: There are as many paths to God as there are breaths of the children of Adam.
homepage.author: Sufi adage
